title: PipeShare addon loader fix — files and folder view restored (dbg134)
description:
PipeShare stopped loading files and folder spaces because addon scripts (file explorer, admin panel, customer support, etc.) were 404ing. The addon loader resolved manifest paths relative to pipeshare/core/ instead of client-portal/, so every addon index.js failed to load.

This release fixes path resolution in addon-loader.js and bumps the portal cache to dbg134. After deploy, hard refresh PipeShare — explorer, Folder view picker, and addon boot should work normally again.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Fix PipeShare addon-loader: resolve manifest paths from client-portal/ base URL.
Restores file explorer, uploader, autosync, admin panel, customer support addon boot.
Folder view / numbered job folders work again once addons load.
